WITH RECURSIVE 
-- First, identify cards that have no previous card (starting points)
starting_points AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM collection
    WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT nextCardId FROM collection WHERE nextCardId IS NOT NULL)
),
-- Then build paths starting from these cards
path_cte AS (
    -- Base case: start with cards that have no previous card
    SELECT id, nextCardId, id::TEXT AS path
    FROM collection
    WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM starting_points)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: follow the nextCardId links
    SELECT p.id, c.nextCardId, p.path || ' --> ' || c.nextCardId::TEXT
    FROM path_cte p
    JOIN collection c ON p.nextCardId = c.id
    WHERE c.nextCardId IS NOT NULL
)
-- Select the complete paths (those that end with a card having no next card)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN c.nextCardId IS NULL THEN path
        ELSE path || ' --> ' || c.nextCardId::TEXT
    END AS complete_path
FROM path_cte p
JOIN collection c ON p.nextCardId = c.id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM path_cte p2 
    WHERE p2.id = p.id AND LENGTH(p2.path) > LENGTH(p.path)
)
ORDER BY SPLIT_PART(path, ' --> ', 1)::INTEGER;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_team_attributes_eff_to() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    -- Update the eff_to date for the previous record of the same team
    UPDATE team_attributes
    SET eff_to = TO_TIMESTAMP(NEW.date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
    WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id
      AND eff_to IS NULL
      AND TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE < TO_TIMESTAMP(NEW.date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE;
    
    -- Update all records for this team to ensure proper sequencing
    UPDATE team_attributes ta
    SET eff_to = subquery.next_date - INTERVAL '1 day'
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            id,
            COALESCE(
                LEAD(TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE, 1) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE),
                TO_DATE('5999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
            ) AS next_date
        FROM team_attributes
        WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id
    ) AS subquery
    WHERE ta.id = subquery.id
      AND ta.team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id;
    
    RETURN NULL;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

    FROM generate_series(
        DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') + 1,  -- Start from the next day
        DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24') - 1,  -- End at the previous day
        interval '1 day'
    ) AS the_day
    WHERE EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM the_day) < 6  -- Only weekdays (1-5)
),
start_day_info AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') < 6 THEN 
                EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (TIME '24:00:00' - TIME '10:34:36')) * 3600 + 
                EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM TIME '10:34:36') * 60 + 
                EXTRACT(SECOND FROM TIME '10:34:36')
            ELSE 0
        END AS start_day_seconds
),
end_day_info AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24') < 6 THEN 
                EXTRACT(HOUR FROM TIME '15:12:24') * 3600 + 
                EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM TIME '15:12:24') * 60 + 
                EXTRACT(SECOND FROM TIME '15:12:24')
            ELSE 0
        END AS end_day_seconds
),
total_seconds AS (
    SELECT 
        (num_business_days * 86400) + 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') < 6 AND 
                 EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24') < 6 AND
                 DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') = DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24')
            THEN 
                end_day_seconds - (86400 - start_day_seconds)
            ELSE
                end_day_seconds + start_day_seconds
        END AS total_business_seconds
    FROM business_days, start_day_info, end_day_info
)
SELECT 
    FLOOR(total_business_seconds / 86400)::text || ' days ' || 
    FLOOR((total_business_seconds % 86400) / 3600)::text || ' hours ' ||

    (total_business_seconds % 60)::text || ' seconds' AS business_time_diff
FROM total_seconds;

)

    MIN(StartDate) AS StartDate,

FROM GroupIdentifiers

ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate
